title: KBFPCL Driver cum Salesman Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
org: Kudumbashree Broiler Farmers' Producer Company Limited (KBFPCL)
shortInfo: The latest Kudumbashree Broiler Farmers' Producer Company Limited (KBFPCL) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Driver cum Salesman posts! Published on 13 May 2026 at the official website, this new recruitment drive offers 1 opening for eligible candidates. Applicants within the age group of 21 to 40 years and possessing a Plus Two (12th standard) or equivalent qualification, a valid LMV driving license with badge, and a minimum of 2 years of experience in driving and/or sales, with basic proficiency in reading and writing Malayalam and English, can apply offline on or before 28 May 2026. F

selection_process: Application Screening Driving efficiency assessment (vehicle handling skills
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for KBFPCL Driver cum Salesman Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: cmd.kerala.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 28-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the KBFPCL Driver cum Salesman recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the KBFPCL Driver cum Salesman recruitment is 28th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Driver cum Salesman post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed Plus Two (12th standard) or an equivalent qualification. Additionally, a valid driving license with an LMV badge is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 40 years for all candidates applying for the Driver cum Salesman position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Driver cum Salesman role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. ₹21,070/-. This is a consolidated salary for the contract period.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Driver cum Salesman post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Driver cum Salesman post in the Kudumbashree Broiler Farmers' Producer Company Limited (KBFPCL).

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the KBFPCL Driver cum Salesman recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the required experience for the Driver cum Salesman position?
faq.answer: A minimum of 2 years of experience in driving and/or the sales field is required for candidates applying for this post.

faq.question: Q9. What are the key stages in the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial application screening, followed by a driving efficiency assessment to evaluate vehicle handling and safety skills, and finally, a personal interview.

faq.question: Q10. What languages proficiency is required for the Driver cum Salesman role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess basic proficiency in reading and writing both Malayalam and English to be eligible for the Driver cum Salesman position.
